combined_comment: To students from Nepal who reached out to us - I did not make this video to 'speak up for you'  - I made this video because you 'raised your own voice' /// spoke up loud and clear - and rattled people in power. I am just a small cog in the wheel - standing in solitary with Nepalese students who have shown what courage is and what it means to fight back.  Justice however is far from done - he's hoping that students will peacefully but forcefully ask for justice and not be deterred by threats or a smear campaign.  As a Deshbhakt - I am ashamed that some of my countrymen / women acted in this manner - my apologies for what it's worth.
